product_description: CommonLit is a non-profit educational technology platform that provides free reading and writing instruction, offering a library of literary and informational texts with integrated tools to support diverse learners. The platform aims to make high-quality literacy resources accessible to all students and teachers.

vendor_resources.justification: This page is titled 'Accessibility' and outlines CommonLit's commitment to WCAG 2.1 AA guidelines and the ADA.
